pageContext.name: Toothless Vinyl Piggy Bank
pageContext.description: As the descendant of the legendary god of thunder and death, he is misunderstood as a Night Fury. In reality, he is more like a kitten with huge wings whose appearance changes everything. Of course, he is the lovable Toothless!With large, accentuated head, eyes, and other features, this large piggy bank will do a wonderful job of guarding your treasure and coins (gold or otherwise) and look absolutely adorable while doing it! The patterns on his body are faithfully recreated as well.  Sitting at approximately 13.38 inches tall and 14.96 inches wide, and possessing a movable head and wings, this piece will serve wonderful as a dual-purpose collectible in your collection!
